preamble: The vocalization of the voiced uvular fricative [ʁ] into the mid back rounded vowel [o] (or its near-equivalents) is a documented form of r-vocalization and vowel coloring, where the posterior consonant influences the height and rounding of adjacent vocalic segments.

examples.note: Extensive vocalization where the uvular rhotic colors the preceding vowel or merges into a back rounded vowel quality.
Vocalization in certain dialects where the 'R' produces a back rounded off-glide or vowel resonance.
